fix_hints: Declare all six unit-cell parameters: _cell_length_a/b/c and _cell_angle_alpha/beta/gamma.
If the cell is intentionally under-specified, document the missing parameters explicitly in a comment.
message_template: Data block declares some but not all unit-cell parameters in data block '<block>'. Provide all six _cell_length_* and _cell_angle_* tags.

occurrences.message: Data block declares some but not all unit-cell parameters in data block 'data_partial_cell'. Provide all six _cell_length_* and _cell_angle_* tags.
